title: Munne Yen Munne Lyrics Sathuranga Vettai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Munne Yen Munne
Singer(s): Sathya Prakash
Movie: Sathuranga Vettai
Music: Sean Roldan

Kadhala Kadhala | Singer(s): Kalyani Nair
Munne Yen Munne | Singer(s): Sathya Prakash
Porape Nadape | Singer(s): Anthony Dasan
Verichodi Ponathada
Munne en munne pudhu vaanam ela.
Meley imai meley mudhal thooram vila.

Suthamaagiren, maari pogiren
kadhal vasathiley.
Meendum vellai thaalaaga
vazhkai aanadho ...
Kadhal thoorigai kondu
vannam theettudho ..

Kudisayin vazhiye
valiyum paal nilaa.
undhan mel vilundhu therikka
pudhu kerakkathai kodukkudhadi.

Viyarvayin thuliyayai
padamaai maattri.
undhan kaiyyodu kodukka
endhan vizhigalum kalangudhadi.

NIjamaa kanamaa puriyaa nilaiyil
en naatkal unnodu odum.

Thani oru ulagil , neeyum naanumaai
kadhal neer vittu valarthom
andha ssedi indru pookkudhadi.

Karuvinil asaiyum uyirin osayayai
ketkum nam nenjodu adhan idhayamum thudikkudhai

Azhagaai azhagaai kaalam idhupol
maaraamal eppodhum vendum.

Munne en munne pudhu vaanam ela.
Meley imai meley mudhal thooram vila.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Munne Yen Munne'?

The song expresses themes of love and the excitement of new beginnings, capturing the essence of romantic feelings.

How does 'Munne Yen Munne' fit into the plot of Sathuranga Vettai?

This song highlights moments of joy and romance in the movie, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who is the singer of 'Munne Yen Munne'?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash, known for his expressive vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Munne Yen Munne' was composed by Sean Roldan, who is celebrated for his innovative sound.

When was 'Munne Yen Munne' released?

The song was released on May 4, 2014, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Munne Yen Munne, the protagonist experiences the thrill of love, beautifully captured through vibrant melodies and heartfelt lyrics. The song serves as a backdrop to significant moments in Sathuranga Vettai, conveying emotions of joy and excitement. With its upbeat tempo and romantic essence, it resonates with anyone who has felt the spark of affection. The engaging composition by Sean Roldan, paired with Sathya Prakash's soulful voice, makes this track a memorable highlight of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Munne Yen Munne from Sathuranga Vettai is a captivating blend of romance and energy, showcasing the unique vocal prowess of Sathya Prakash. With Sean Roldan's vibrant music, this track perfectly encapsulates the excitement of love and life. Dive into this melodic journey that promises to uplift your spirits and resonate with your heart.
stanzaMeanings: In the new sky, my dear, everything is bright. Above, the sky is clear and the beginning is beautiful.
I am changing, moving in the love atmosphere. Is life becoming a blank canvas again... Is love bringing colors to the sky?
Through the way of living, the moon shines bright. It gives a new light that reflects on you.
In the softness of the breeze, I change the picture. With your hand, my eyes are amazed.
In reality, I truly understand the state of my days spent with you.
In this unique world, you and I grow love together, and that bond blooms today.
In the darkness, the desire and the heartbeat of life are heard, and that makes my heart beat.
Beautifully, beautifully, this time should never change, it is always needed.
In the new sky, my dear, everything is bright. Above, the sky is clear and the beginning is beautiful.
I am changing, moving in the love atmosphere.
